subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-07 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: I very much wished to attend the gathering last night, but alas, I was unable to do this
subcodes.first_line_orig: دیشب من خیلی میل داشتم بمجلس بیایم افسوس که نتوانستم الحمد لله شما گل پاریس
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
